_meta.howToUse: Three end-to-end wave scenarios for grading a growth-machine run (skill mode or Codex CLI mode) against the actual contracts in src/types.ts, without touching src/. Feed one scenario's `prompt` to the agent exactly as a user would ('run the growth machine on <prompt>, wave 1'), let it run stations 1 through 9, then check the resulting waves/wave-NN/readout.json against that scenario's `expected_behavior`. Every field name below matches a real interface in src/types.ts (Variant, NamedAsset, JudgeResult, Decision, RolloutDraft): a grading script or a human reviewer can diff readout.json's actual shape against expected_behavior field by field. `angleType_focus` names which of the three angleTypes (moment/evergreen/ugc-loop) this scenario's moment most naturally pulls toward, but every wave still must produce exactly one variant of each angleType regardless of scenario, that rule is in expected_behavior.variants on all three scenarios identically. This file does not grade creative quality (that is what station 6, judge, and the onBrief/shareable scoring anchors in skill/SKILL.md are for), it grades structural conformance: right counts, right shapes, right conditionals.

scenarios.prompt: run the growth machine on the world cup final, wave 1

namedAssets.rule: one still and one motion NamedAsset per variant (3 variants x 2 formats)
namedAssets.determinism: same moment + variant + format + waveNumber must always produce the same name

produced.rule: motion assets always carry assetPath: null and a 3-entry motionScript array; still assets carry assetPath set once real generation runs (or null if codex was unavailable, in which case the prompt is handed to the user instead of failing the wave)

judged.rule: any dimension scoring 1 is a fail; a failed asset gets at most one regenerate-and-rescore retry, never more

simulated.rule: still assets only, motion never enters the simulated curve; seed is a hash of the asset name so reruns are identical

rollouts.rule: exactly one RolloutDraft per SCALE verdict, zero RolloutDraft objects when nothing scaled; KILL and ITERATE assets never produce a RolloutDraft
rollouts.participationKit_rule: non-null only when the SCALE'd variant's angleType is ugc-loop, null for every other angleType

scenarios.prompt: run the growth machine on back to school season, wave 1

namedAssets.rule: one still and one motion NamedAsset per variant (3 variants x 2 formats)
namedAssets.determinism: same moment + variant + format + waveNumber must always produce the same name

produced.rule: motion assets always carry assetPath: null and a 3-entry motionScript array; still assets carry assetPath set once real generation runs (or null if codex was unavailable, in which case the prompt is handed to the user instead of failing the wave)

judged.rule: any dimension scoring 1 is a fail; a failed asset gets at most one regenerate-and-rescore retry, never more

simulated.rule: still assets only, motion never enters the simulated curve; seed is a hash of the asset name so reruns are identical

rollouts.rule: exactly one RolloutDraft per SCALE verdict, zero RolloutDraft objects when nothing scaled; KILL and ITERATE assets never produce a RolloutDraft
rollouts.participationKit_rule: non-null only when the SCALE'd variant's angleType is ugc-loop, null for every other angleType

scenarios.prompt: run the growth machine on the mercury retrograde chat-screenshot trend, wave 1

namedAssets.rule: one still and one motion NamedAsset per variant (3 variants x 2 formats)
namedAssets.determinism: same moment + variant + format + waveNumber must always produce the same name

produced.rule: motion assets always carry assetPath: null and a 3-entry motionScript array; still assets carry assetPath set once real generation runs (or null if codex was unavailable, in which case the prompt is handed to the user instead of failing the wave)

judged.rule: any dimension scoring 1 is a fail; a failed asset gets at most one regenerate-and-rescore retry, never more

simulated.rule: still assets only, motion never enters the simulated curve; seed is a hash of the asset name so reruns are identical

rollouts.rule: exactly one RolloutDraft per SCALE verdict, zero RolloutDraft objects when nothing scaled; KILL and ITERATE assets never produce a RolloutDraft
rollouts.participationKit_rule: non-null only when the SCALE'd variant's angleType is ugc-loop, null for every other angleType
rollouts.note: this scenario is the one most likely to exercise the participationKit branch, since its moment naturally pulls a ugc-loop variant toward SCALE, but the same rule applies regardless of which variant actually scales
